SEARCH
Package com.hotelreservation.room.service

Class RoomService

java.lang.Object
com.hotelreservation.room.service.RoomService
@Service public class RoomService extends Object
Service layer for hotel room management business logic.

Handles all CRUD operations for rooms: retrieval, creation, update, and deletion. Business rules enforced here:

  • Room numbers must be unique across all rooms.
  • On update, the existing room's number may stay the same, but must not conflict with any other room's number.

Entity-to-DTO mapping is delegated to RoomMapper, keeping this class focused on business logic (Single Responsibility Principle).

  • Constructor Details

    • RoomService

      public RoomService(RoomRepository roomRepository, RoomMapper roomMapper)
      Constructs the service with required repository and mapper dependencies.
      Parameters:
      roomRepository - JPA repository for room persistence operations
      roomMapper - mapper for converting between Room entity and RoomDTO

  • Method Details

    • getAllRooms

      public List<RoomDTO> getAllRooms()
      Retrieves all hotel rooms from the database.
      Returns:
      a list of all rooms as RoomDTO; empty list if no rooms exist

    • getRoomById

      public RoomDTO getRoomById(Long roomId)
      Retrieves a single room by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      roomId - the primary key of the room to retrieve
      Returns:
      the matching room as a RoomDTO
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no room with the given ID exists

    • createRoom

      @Transactional public RoomDTO createRoom(RoomDTO roomDTO)
      Creates a new hotel room after validating the room number is unique.
      Parameters:
      roomDTO - the room data submitted by the admin
      Returns:
      the persisted room as a RoomDTO (with the generated ID)
      Throws:
      APIException - with 400 BAD_REQUEST if the room number already exists

    • updateRoom

      @Transactional public RoomDTO updateRoom(Long roomId, RoomDTO roomDTO)
      Updates an existing room's details.

      Room number uniqueness is validated while excluding the room being updated — this allows an admin to submit the same room number without triggering a conflict (i.e. keeping the number unchanged is always valid).

      Parameters:
      roomId - the primary key of the room to update
      roomDTO - the updated room data
      Returns:
      the updated room as a RoomDTO
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no room with the given ID exists
      APIException - with 400 BAD_REQUEST if the new room number conflicts with a different existing room

    • deleteRoom

      @Transactional public void deleteRoom(Long roomId)
      Deletes a room from the system by its ID.
      Parameters:
      roomId - the primary key of the room to delete
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no room with the given ID exists
